subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Prisoner unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, that thou worship none save Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من المسجون الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم ان لاتعبد الا ایاه ثم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @prayer for teaching, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
